StopRule: Frozen pre-2021 discovery. The disabled control must exactly reproduce the leader. Every report must be profitable. Both center eras must retain >=98% of control; center continuous net must improve >=5%, CAGR >=control +0.08 point, PF >=95% of control, DD <=min(1.25%, control +0.15 point), and recovery/return-DD >=95% of control. Partial activity must be confirmed. At least four of six neighbors must retain both-era floors and improve continuous net >=2% with the same quality and drawdown limits. Initial risk, entries, portfolio cap, and all account protections remain fixed. No post-result rescue.
